info.title: Livabl API
info.description:
The following documentation outlines objects and endpoints for Livabl’s Leads API. Access to our Leads API is offered to Featured and/or Verified clients, enabling custom integrations with your CRM software and third party integrations like Zapier.

To obtain an API key, you can access your Builder Dashboard account and go to the Settings > Integrations page. From here, you can generate up to 20 API keys (either for all of the company’s leads, or for a selection of communities).

If you have any questions or general feedback, please send us an email at success@livabl.com

parameters.name: APIKey
parameters.description: The API key associated with this company

get.summary: Gets the leads for a company.
get.description:
Sample request 1:
GET /Company/Communities/Leads -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw==' \
Sample request 2:
GET /Company/Communities/Leads?start_date=2022-01-01&end_date=2022-01-31 -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw==' \
Sample request 3:
GET /Company/Communities/Leads?hours=12 -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw==' \
Sample request 4:
GET /Company/Communities/Leads?minutes=5 -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw=='

parameters.name: APIKey
parameters.description: The API key associated with this company

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The date, in YYYY-MM-DD format, from which requests are filtered. Ex: 2022-03-01 (optional)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The date, in YYYY-MM-DD format, to which requests are filtered. Ex: 2022-03-31 (optional)

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: The time frame, in hours, within which requests are filtered. Ex: 12, to fetch the leads sent out in last 12 hours (optional)

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: The time, in minutes, within which requests are filtered. Ex: 5, to fetch the leads sent out in last 5 minutes (optional)

get.summary: Gets the leads for a development.
get.description:
Sample request 1:
GET /Company/Communities/{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000}/Leads -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw==' \
Sample request 2:
GET /Company/Communities/{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000}/Leads?start_date=2022-01-01&end_date=2022-01-31 -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw==' \
Sample request 3:
GET /Company/Communities/{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000}/Leads?hours=12 -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw==' \
Sample request 4:
GET /Company/Communities/{00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000}/Leads?minutes=5 -H 'APIKey: bIAooQZBnkGzx8O1FEK4nw=='

parameters.name: DevelopmentID
parameters.description: The unique ID of the Community. The DevelopmentID for each community can be obtained from GET /Company/Communities

parameters.name: APIKey
parameters.description: The API key linked to this community

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The date, in YYYY-MM-DD format, from which requests are filtered. Ex: 2022-03-01 (optional)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The date, in YYYY-MM-DD format, to which requests are filtered. Ex: 2022-03-31 (optional)

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: The time frame, in hours, within which requests are filtered. Ex: 12, to fetch the leads sent out in last 12 hours (optional)

parameters.name: minutes
parameters.description: The time, in minutes, within which requests are filtered. Ex: 5, to fetch the leads sent out in last 5 minutes (optional)

get.summary: Gets the details of an individual lead.

parameters.name: LeadID
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the lead

get.summary: Gets the leads which are of appointment type.

parameters.name: AppointmentID
parameters.description: The unique id of the appointment lead

get.summary: Gets a list of communities associated with the Company and API key.

parameters.name: APIKey
parameters.description: The API key linked to this company

get.summary: Gets the information about the company associated with this api key.
Gets the leads for a Livabl Pro Agent.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key linked to the Livabl Pro Agent.

id.description:
Name of the community
Unique identifier for each request, usually
used by automation tools such as Zaiper

Provider_Development_ID.description: If the community listing is being updated by a Builder Feed, this is the feed provider’s unique ID for that community

id.description:
Unique identifier for each request, usually
used by automation tools such as Zaiper

Num_Developments.description: Number of Active Developments associated with the API key.

ssfUnitID.description: The unique Identifier for the unit changes in SSF Database.

FeedDevelopmentUnitDataModel.description: The model for development unit data model with unique identifier on ssf database.

lead_Type.description: If Virtual Appointment request, value = 'appointment'. If typical lead, value = 'online lead'

first_name.description: First name of the lead. Since BBH does not have separate first name and last name fields, this value will be the first word on the 'Name' field of the ‘Contact Development’ box on community listings

last_name.description: Last name of the lead. Since BBH does not have separate first name and last name fields, this value will be all words after the first word and space. If the user only entered their first name, the last_name value will default to ‘UNKNOWN’.

date_request.description: If lead_type = 'appointment', this is the Date the user has requested to be contacted

time_request.description: If lead_type = 'appointment', this is the Time the user has requested to be contacted

message.description: A message that the user has included (ex. “Please send me pricing and floor plans for this community)

location.description: Location data on the user, based on their IP address when they sent the lead. Includes City/State/Country

city.description: City where the user sent the lead from (based on ‘location’)

state.description: State/province where the user sent the lead from (based on ‘location’)

country.description: Country where the user sent the lead from (based on ‘location’)

timeStamp.description: Date and time in which the lead was sent

budget.description: Budget of the user (Min - max). This will always be a general price range (ex. $400,000 - $600,000) based on pre-set values

working_with_realtor.description: Whether the user is working with a Realtor. Values include ‘Yes, I'm working with a realtor’, ‘No’, ‘I am a realtor’

purchase_type.description: What type of purchaser the lead is. Values include ‘First time buyer’, ‘Upsizing’, ‘Downsizing’, ‘Investment’, ‘Just researching’ and ‘Not sure yet

url.description: Referral URL (which page on BBH the lead was sent from)

plan_unit.description: Name of the plan/unit the user is interested in (if sent from an individual Plan/Unit page on the Community listing)

provider_development_id.description: If the community listing is being updated by a Builder Feed, this is the feed provider’s unique ID for that community

agent_id.description: Unique ID of the Livabl Pro agent

first_name.description: First name of the lead. Since BBH does not have separate first name and last name fields, this value will be the first word on the 'Name' field of the ‘Contact Development’ box on community listings

last_name.description: Last name of the lead. Since BBH does not have separate first name and last name fields, this value will be all words after the first word and space. If the user only entered their first name, the last_name value will default to ‘UNKNOWN’.

message.description: A message that the user has included (ex. “Please send me pricing and floor plans for this community)

location.description: Location data on the user, based on their IP address when they sent the lead. Includes City/State/Country

city.description: City where the user sent the lead from (based on ‘location’)

state.description: State/province where the user sent the lead from (based on ‘location’)

country.description: Country where the user sent the lead from (based on ‘location’)

timeStamp.description: Date and time in which the lead was sent

budget.description: Budget of the user (Min - max). This will always be a general price range (ex. $400,000 - $600,000) based on pre-set values

purchase_type.description: What type of purchaser the lead is. Values include ‘First time buyer’, ‘Upsizing’, ‘Downsizing’, ‘Investment’, ‘Just researching’ and ‘Not sure yet

url.description: Referral URL (which page on BBH the lead was sent from)

plan_unit.description: Name of the plan/unit the user is interested in (if sent from an individual Plan/Unit page on the Community listing)

development_location.description: Location of the community, formatted as Address, City, State/Province, Country, Postal Code

development_city.description: City where the community is located

development_state.description: State/province where the community is located

development_type.description: Details the building type(s) of the community

development_price_range.description: The price range of the community, if available
